name: tools_documentation
description: Get documentation for n8n MCP tools. Call without parameters for quick start guide. Use topic parameter to get documentation for specific tools. Use depth='full' for comprehensive documentation.

topic.description: Tool name (e.g., "search_nodes") or "overview" for general guide. Leave empty for quick reference.

depth.description: Level of detail. "essentials" (default) for quick reference, "full" for comprehensive docs.

name: search_nodes
description: Search n8n nodes by keyword with optional real-world examples. Pass query as string. Example: query="webhook" or query="database". Returns max 20 results. Use includeExamples=true to get top 2 template configs per node.

query.description: Search terms. Use quotes for exact phrase.

includeExamples.description: Include top 2 real-world configuration examples from popular templates (default: false)

source.description: Filter by node source: all=everything (default), core=n8n base nodes, community=community nodes, verified=verified community nodes only

name: get_node
description: Get node info with progressive detail levels and multiple modes. Detail: minimal (~200 tokens), standard (~1-2K, default), full (~3-8K). Modes: info (default), docs (markdown documentation), search_properties (find properties), versions/compare/breaking/migrations (version info).

detail.description: Information detail level. standard=essential properties (recommended), full=everything

mode.description: Operation mode. info=node schema, docs=readable markdown documentation, search_properties=find specific properties, versions/compare/breaking/migrations=version info

includeTypeInfo.description: Include type structure metadata. Only applies to mode=info.

includeExamples.description: Include real-world configuration examples from templates. Only applies to mode=info with detail=standard.

toVersion.description: Target version for compare mode (e.g., "2.0"). Defaults to latest if omitted.

propertyQuery.description: For mode=search_properties: search term to find properties (e.g., "auth", "header", "body")

name: validate_node
description: Validate n8n node configuration. Use mode='full' for comprehensive validation with errors/warnings/suggestions, mode='minimal' for quick required fields check. Example: nodeType="nodes-base.slack", config={resource:"channel",operation:"create"}

config.description: Configuration as object. For simple nodes use {}. For complex nodes include fields like {resource:"channel",operation:"create"}

mode.description: Validation mode. full=comprehensive validation with errors/warnings/suggestions, minimal=quick required fields check only.

profile.description: Profile for mode=full: "minimal", "runtime", "ai-friendly", or "strict". Default is "ai-friendly"

name: get_template
description: Get template by ID. Use mode to control response size: nodes_only (minimal), structure (nodes+connections), full (complete workflow).

mode.description: Response detail level. nodes_only: just node list, structure: nodes+connections, full: complete workflow JSON.

name: search_templates
description: Search templates with multiple modes. Use searchMode='keyword' for text search, 'by_nodes' to find templates using specific nodes, 'by_task' for curated task-based templates, 'by_metadata' for filtering by complexity/setup time/services.

searchMode.description: Search mode. keyword=text search (default), by_nodes=find by node types, by_task=curated task templates, by_metadata=filter by complexity/services

fields.description: For searchMode=keyword: fields to include in response.

nodeTypes.description: For searchMode=by_nodes: array of node types

task.description: For searchMode=by_task: the type of task

complexity.description: For searchMode=by_metadata: filter by complexity level

maxSetupMinutes.description: For searchMode=by_metadata: maximum setup time in minutes

minSetupMinutes.description: For searchMode=by_metadata: minimum setup time in minutes

requiredService.description: For searchMode=by_metadata: filter by required service (e.g., "openai", "slack")

targetAudience.description: For searchMode=by_metadata: filter by target audience

name: validate_workflow
description: Full workflow validation: structure, connections, expressions, AI tools. Returns errors/warnings/fixes. Essential before deploy.

workflow.description: The complete workflow JSON to validate. Must include nodes array and connections object.

validateNodes.description: Validate individual node configurations. Default true.

validateConnections.description: Validate node connections and flow. Default true.

validateExpressions.description: Validate n8n expressions syntax and references. Default true.

profile.description: Validation profile for node validation. Default "runtime".

name: n8n_create_workflow
description: Create workflow. Requires: name, nodes[], connections{}. Created inactive. Returns workflow with ID.

nodes.description: Array of workflow nodes. Each node must have: id, name, type, typeVersion, position, and parameters

connections.description: Workflow connections object. Keys are source node names, values define output connections

name: n8n_get_workflow
description: Get workflow by ID with different detail levels. Use mode='full' for complete workflow, 'details' for metadata+stats, 'structure' for nodes/connections only, 'minimal' for id/name/active/tags.

mode.description: Detail level: full=complete workflow, details=full+execution stats, structure=nodes/connections topology, minimal=metadata only

name: n8n_update_full_workflow
description: Full workflow update. Requires complete nodes[] and connections{}. For incremental use n8n_update_partial_workflow.

name: n8n_update_partial_workflow
description: Update workflow incrementally with diff operations. Types: addNode, removeNode, updateNode, moveNode, enable/disableNode, addConnection, removeConnection, updateSettings, updateName, add/removeTag.

operations.description: Array of diff operations to apply. Each operation must have a "type" field.

validateOnly.description: If true, only validate operations without applying them

continueOnError.description: If true, apply valid operations even if some fail. Default: false (atomic)

name: n8n_delete_workflow
description: Permanently delete a workflow. This action cannot be undone.

name: n8n_list_workflows
description: List workflows (minimal metadata only). Returns id/name/active/dates/tags. Check hasMore/nextCursor for pagination.

limit.description: Number of workflows to return (1-100, default: 100)

excludePinnedData.description: Exclude pinned data from response (default: true)

name: n8n_validate_workflow
description: Validate workflow by ID. Checks nodes, connections, expressions. Returns errors/warnings/suggestions.

name: n8n_autofix_workflow
description: Automatically fix common workflow validation errors. Preview fixes or apply them. Fixes expression format, typeVersion, error output config, webhook paths, connection structure issues.

applyFixes.description: Apply fixes to workflow (default: false - preview mode)

fixTypes.description: Types of fixes to apply (default: all)

confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum confidence level for fixes (default: medium)

maxFixes.description: Maximum number of fixes to apply (default: 50)

name: n8n_test_workflow
description: Test/trigger workflow execution. Auto-detects trigger type (webhook/form/chat). Note: Only workflows with these trigger types can be executed externally.

triggerType.description: Trigger type. Auto-detected if not specified.

webhookPath.description: For webhook: override the webhook path

message.description: For chat: message to send (required for chat triggers)

sessionId.description: For chat: session ID for conversation continuity

name: n8n_executions
description: Manage workflow executions: get details, list, or delete. Use action='get' with id for execution details, action='list' for listing executions, action='delete' to remove execution record.

action.description: Operation: get=get execution details, list=list executions, delete=delete execution

id.description: Execution ID (required for action=get or action=delete)

nodeNames.description: For action=get with mode=filtered: filter to specific nodes by name

itemsLimit.description: For action=get with mode=filtered: items per node

includeInputData.description: For action=get: include input data (default: false)

errorItemsLimit.description: For action=get with mode=error: sample items from upstream node (default: 2, max: 100)

includeStackTrace.description: For action=get with mode=error: include full stack trace

includeExecutionPath.description: For action=get with mode=error: include execution path (default: true)

fetchWorkflow.description: For action=get with mode=error: fetch workflow for upstream detection (default: true)

limit.description: For action=list: number of executions to return (1-100, default: 100)

workflowId.description: For action=list: filter by workflow ID

projectId.description: For action=list: filter by project ID

status.description: For action=list: filter by execution status

includeData.description: For action=list: include execution data (default: false)

name: n8n_health_check
description: Check n8n instance health and API connectivity. Use mode='diagnostic' for detailed troubleshooting with env vars and tool status.

mode.description: Mode: status (default) for quick health check, diagnostic for detailed debug info

verbose.description: Include extra details in diagnostic mode (default: false)

name: n8n_workflow_versions
description: Manage workflow version history, rollback, and cleanup. Six modes: list (show history), get (get specific version), rollback (restore to previous), delete (delete version), prune (keep N most recent), truncate (delete ALL versions for ALL workflows).

workflowId.description: Workflow ID (required for list, rollback, delete, prune)

versionId.description: Version ID (required for get mode and single version delete)

limit.description: Max versions to return in list mode

deleteAll.description: Delete all versions for workflow (delete mode only)

maxVersions.description: Keep N most recent versions (prune mode only)

confirmTruncate.description: Must be true to truncate all versions (truncate mode only)

name: n8n_deploy_template
description: Deploy a workflow template from n8n.io directly to your n8n instance. Deploys first, then auto-fixes common issues. Returns workflow ID, required credentials, and fixes applied.

autoUpgradeVersions.description: Automatically upgrade node typeVersions to latest supported
